mapper.select: SELECT id, functionary, name, type, description, enrollment_start_time, enrollment_end_time, start_time, expected_end_time, end_time, cover_path, max_participants, status, is_full, duration, rejected_reason, imported FROM activities WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, functionary, name, type, description, enrollment_start_time, enrollment_end_time, start_time, expected_end_time, end_time, cover_path, max_participants, status, is_full, duration, rejected_reason, imported FROM activities ORDER BY start_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE activities SET functionary = #{functionary}, name = #{name}, type = #{type}, description = #{description}, enrollment_start_time = #{enrollmentStartTime}, enrollment_end_time = #{enrollmentEndTime}, start_time = #{startTime}, expected_end_time = #{expectedEndTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, cover_path = #{coverPath}, max_participants = #{maxParticipant}, status = #{status}, is_full = #{isFull}, duration = #{duration} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT path FROM activity_attachments WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
SELECT student_no FROM activity_participants WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM activity_participants WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM activity_participants WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND student_no = #{studentNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM activity_participants WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND student_no = #{studentNo}
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.functionary, a.name, a.type, a.description, a.enrollment_start_time, a.enrollment_end_time, a.start_time, a.expected_end_time, a.end_time, a.cover_path, a.max_participants, a.status, a.is_full, a.duration, a.rejected_reason, a.imported FROM activities a INNER JOIN activity_participants ap ON a.id = ap.activity_id WHERE ap.student_no = #{studentNo} ORDER BY a.expected_end_time DESC
SELECT type, COUNT(*) as count FROM activities GROUP BY type ORDER BY count DESC
